rulings.Case Title: PATRICK HELLAND VS. RAY BRONNER et al

rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, June 22, 2009, line 2, Plaintiff Patrick Helland's Order To Show Cause Re Contempt. PARTIES TO REPORT IN DEPARTMENT 302 FOR JUDGE WOOLARD TO HEAR THIS MATTER. =(302/PJB)

rulings.Case Title: ADAM WILLUMSEN VS. A.Y.WHEELER ABSOLUTE WINDOWN CLEANING LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, June 22, 2009, line 3, DEFENDANT ABSOLUTE WINDOW CLEANING, LLC, WHEELER A.Y.'S COUNSEL'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. MOTION DOES NOT COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1362(c) BECAUSE COUNSEL'S DECLARATION IS NOT ON A JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM. =(302/PJB)

rulings.Case Title: LESLIE C MCWHIRTER VS. STEVEN A FABBRO
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, June 22, 2009, line 4, DEFENDANT STEVEN FABBRO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. THE DEMURRER IS OVERRULED BECAUSE THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE IS NOT ESTABLISHED FROM THE FACE OF THE COMPLAINT. TO THE EXTENT IT ADDRESSES THE PRAYER FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES, IT WILL BE TREATED AS A MOTION TO STRIKE AND GRANTED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD FACTS THAT COULD SUPPORT SUCH RELIEF. =(302/PJB)

rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, June 22, 2009, line 5, DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK N.A.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR AS MOOT PER DISMISSAL FILED JUNE 5, 2009. =(302/PJB)

rulings.Case Title: MONICA DONG et al VS. DALE A FODE et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, June 22, 2009, line 6, DEFENDANTS DALE FODE AND MEI FODE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS Off calendar per moving party. =(302/PJB)

rulings.Case Title: PANCHO VILLA LICENSING LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. AP DELI AND FOODS INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff Pancho Villa Licensing Llc'S Order To Show Cause
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, June 22, 2009, line 7, Plaintiff Pancho Villa Licensing LLC'S Order To Show Cause. PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION GRANTED AS TO THE STIPULATED ITEMS, BUT OTHERWISE DENIED BECAUSE PLAINTIFF HAS NOT DEMONSTRATED A LIKELIHOOD OF SUCCESS ON THE MERITS AS TO THOSE ITEMS, AND THE BALANCE OF EQUITIES WEIGHS AGAINST THAT RELIEF. PLAINTIFF IS TO POST AN UNDERTAKING IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,000, & TO PROHIBIT USE OF THE NAME "TOFU RANCHERO" ON DEFENDANT'S MENU. =(302/PJB)

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: IN RE LORRIE BARANCO

GRANTED. =(302/PJB)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. ARTHUR WEBB et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion Opposing Retaliation Eviction & Judgemnt Motion Opposing 5-Day Notice To Quit, Negligence Among Case Managers, Conspiracy Among Attorneys
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, June 22, 2009, line 17, DEFENDANT ARTHUR WEBB'S Motion Opposing Retaliation Eviction & Judgment Motion Opposing 5-Day Notice To Quit, Negligence Among Case Managers, Conspiracy Among Attorneys IS CONTINUED JULY 9, 2009 WHEN PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL IS AVAILABLE. MOREOVER, DEFENDANT TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. =(302/PJB)
